Be part of the project's growth

The Web of Origins is still in its early stages and needs both technical and financial support. If you find value in this work and wish to help along the way, any contribution — whether a $1 coffee or a few words of encouragement — truly means a lot and keeps the project moving forward. Your support would help cover essentials like the domain, tools, hosting, and subscriptions, plus the much-needed coffees for late-night research 😉.

Thank you readers and supporters for being part of this journey!

Do Github Sponsor Buy Me a Coffee
